hero.title: Battery Storage Solutions
hero.subtitle: Maximise your solar energy utilisation with BrightPeak Energy' PV Battery Storage solutions. It makes so much sense to pair a battery with your solar panels.

contentBlocks.paragraph: Solar panels generate electricity during daylight hours — typically between 9am and 4pm. But most Irish households use the most electricity in the evenings, when panels produce little or nothing. Without a battery, any excess electricity your panels generate during the day gets exported to the grid. With a battery, that surplus energy is stored and ready to use when you need it most.

It makes sense if nobody is home during the day while the panels are generating electricity. If you don't use it then most of that energy will go back to the grid.

A battery may be less of a priority if someone is at home throughout the day using electricity as it's generated, or if you're working with a tighter budget. In that case, solar panels alone still deliver strong returns and you can always add a battery later as prices continue to fall.

Ireland has some of the highest electricity prices in Europe — currently around 40–50 cent per kWh. Under the Clean Export Guarantee (CEG), your energy supplier must pay you for surplus electricity you send to the grid, but export rates typically range from 10–24 cent per kWh.

That gap — buying at 40–50c, selling at 10–24c — is exactly why storing and self-consuming your own solar energy is so valuable. Every unit of electricity you use from your battery instead of the grid saves you the full import rate.

items.title: Maximise Solar Utilisation
items.desc: Store excess solar energy instead of exporting it — use every kilowatt you generate.

items.title: Lower Energy Bills
items.desc: Use the battery in the evening to power your home (instead of the grid), because that's when grid electricity costs are highest.  Then at night when you go to bed charge the battery using cheaper night-time gris rates.

items.title: Energy Independence
items.desc: Protect your home from grid outages and rising energy prices with stored power

items.title: Eco-Friendly Solution
items.desc: Fully utilise clean, renewable energy and enhance the environmental benefits of your solar system

items.title: Increased Property Value
items.desc: A battery storage system adds value to your home and demonstrates energy efficiency

items.title: Seamless Integration
items.desc: Our systems integrate perfectly with your existing solar setup for a complete energy solution

cta.title: Add Battery Storage to Your Home
cta.subtitle: Whether you already have solar panels or are starting fresh, we can design the perfect battery storage solution for your home.
